reviews.review_description:
I absolutely LOVE this game. It is probably the best game I’ve ever played. A while ago, I was going to go in and play the game and I was at the ranger station part (2.4) and I was really scared to play it so then I just stopped. But after a while; when I got older, I came back to the game and still a little scared of the jump scares, I’m hoping to finish the whole game and finish it again. I really hope you guys can make another one of these or add more parts, making this game even better than it is now! Great game, and hope you have a great day!

Sencirly, slsrocket712

This game is amazing, i love the cell shading, gives the games almost a anime/comic type of feel, and it really makes me develop strategies as i go along as i have to sit in at hiding place and learn how the Raptors move, how they react, and how they behave when i move, and the music sound cues really sells the "OH NO IT'S COMING HIDE" kinda vibe, you really have to sit, wait, time, and execute, i just wish that we could have like a type of tasergun to stun them temporarily with the distraction mechanic, sobif a raptor is chasing you and there is no hidding spot close enough to run too, you can use the Tasergun to stun the Raptor to be able to get to a hiding spot in time, but to make it more difficult and so nobody abuses it constantly, i would either have electrical charges as ammo or a recharge station to make sure that you still need to time things out

This game is super fun and scary but the reason i put a one star review is bc the game uninstalled for some reason and when i went to re install it and play it, all my 10 days progress was gone and started from the plain crash. i don't know if any of the developers can give my progress back but if it's possible please notify me. Ty

I always play this game after school because it is so fun and so scary, I remember screaming at the top of my lungs when I got caught by a raptor while playing. It’s the funnest game on my vr, just buy it when it’s on sale. My only complaint is that it’s so expensive.

the game is fun and great, especially the T-Rex boss. And the ending was amazing

This is one of the BEST VR games I have ever played! The story is amazing, Mia’s acting is phenomenal and all the graphics and dinosaurs look really cool! The graphics aren’t meant to be realistic, so if you like realistic games then this one may not be for you. THIS GAME IS VERY UNDERRATED. It’s a very long campaign story and it is def worth your money (especially on a sale)

GET THIS GAME YOU WILL LOVE IT!!

So I just finished and wanted to say a few things. So if you only like games that look good then maybe don't play . But for people that don't care about graphics it's worth it. Now I loved the story but I wish there was a little more to do . But overall this game was awesome so great job to the game creators.

I hate giving this such a bad review because I love the Jurassic Park/World franchise. This game was kinda fun the first time through but it was really more of a bore. I’m not a huge fan of stealth sections in games to begin with, but this entire game is stealth. I don’t know what I was expecting from a Jurassic World game, but maybe it could’ve at least been a shooter like the Jurassic Park arcade machine. Also, the vibrations tick me off. I get overstimulated if my Apple Watch starts blowing up because some gc is spamming. In this game, there are a couple of sections where you have to find these radio things to align the frequency, and you do it by following the strong vibration in your controller. That sounds simple enough, but as you get closer the vibrations start going faster, and there are raptors on the prowl. So, you could be in a situation where your controller is non-stop vibrating and you just have to sit there and wait in your hiding spot while the raptor slowly moves past you. And if you get caught, you have to start the section all over again. That’s just more of a personal nitpick. The story is so mid. It’s honestly less than mid. The Jurassic World franchise isn’t a stranger to intense virtue signaling, but this is honestly just very cringe. At some point you have to sit and listen to these old audio files about how the main lady worked with Dr Wu on some project with the three raptors in the game (different ones from the original four that were on Nublar), and she will start saying the corniest things after the audio clip plays. Like “that’s not who I am anymore,” and “please don’t be mad at me.” Meanwhile, the main character doesn’t have voice lines anyways. It’s honestly so dumb. 

I do recommend this game at a low price, like a sale. Like the title of this review says, it’s basically crouching simulator. The most fun you can have is when you purposely do stupid things to almost get caught. Like running anywhere with a raptor in the room. You can also slide if you hit the crouch button while running , so that’s pretty cool. Another complaint is the VR UI in this game is trash. You can’t interact with most things. Anything you pick up, you don’t actually use. It just kinda pops out of existence. There are some fun levers and switches, but this game was ported over to the switch as just a regular console game and it honestly feels like that’s appropriate for the UI that is in the game

In conclusion, buy the game on sale. Play it like your life means nothing and you will have fun.
This game was AMAZING the graphics the gameplay the EVERYTHING was the best I've ever seen and I almost shed a tear at the end OMG ITS SO GOOD
This game is boring and it is to short and you cant even tame the raptor like they do in the movie it is boring please give me a refund

reviews.review_title: BETS GAME I HAVE EVER PLAYED
reviews.review_description: it is so fun and scary. and these are the games i like

This is one of if not my favorite games ever, I started playing this game back in 2021 right before or right after part 2 came out. At the time was obsessed with the Jurassic franchise and saw this game on YouTube and thought it looked really cool. So I got the game and instantly fell in love. The amazing cell shader gives it a cartoony/comic book kind of feel, the story line is amazing, the velociraptors are terrifying and I became hooked
I still play it to this day even having have beaten it no less than 5 times. All in all amazing game.
I loved this game i want more

reviews.review_title: The game is amazing and suspenseful!
reviews.review_description: This game is hands-down amazing! From the AI that chases you around the game, to literally heart pounding moments! If you want to game, that is very suspenseful and immersive, buy this game!

First off the graphics or ok…if you like the comic style. The game play is super repetitive. Go to a place, do a lame task, hide, hide, hide, oh and don’t forget to hide. I hated playing hide and seek in real life as a kid. Why would I want to play virtual hide and seek with a dinosaur in VR. GIVE ME A WAY TO DEFEND MY SELF. I played for about 2 hours or so and got so sick of hiding from that stupid velociraptor that I just quit and uninstalled this boring game.

reviews.review_title: Awsome game but could be a little better
reviews.review_description: Ok don’t get me wrong, this game is AMAZING! The dinosaurs are very well designed, the artwork is perfect, it connects a few references to the movies storyline so it’s accurate there, it’s the perfect level of scary and the “you don’t know what’s behind every corner aspect” completes the feel of visiting an old abandoned island where people have died trying to escape the dinosaurs and it’s overall a very enjoyable game, but it comes with its flaws. The main reason I’m writing this review is the problem of intractability. The reason I say that is because the only way to distract a dinosaur is to hack a speaker to make the same sound as all the others and it’s only in specific spots. I wish you could throw an item or something that is lying on a table or something like that to distract the raptors but you can only interact with things that you use in the storyline. Also it’s kinda repetitive in the sense that you’re always sneaking around trying to hack terminals. Don’t get me wrong it’s still very enjoyable, but most of the time it lacks verity. But I think that’s it honestly. Don’t let those critiques change your view of the game. The story is honestly really good and I enjoy it every time I play it. Speaking of, the replayability is really good. I’ve played it a few times now and it’s still fun! Ok that’s all from me, hope this helps!
I love this game it is really fun I love what the graphics are and if you like Jurassic World you should play this game.

But, it doesn't work..

reviews.review_title: Good but could have been amazing.
reviews.review_description: This game could have been amazing. The graphics are good, the art style is super cool, the environments are interesting where you just want to look at things, the sounds that the dinosaurs make are scary and realistic, and the overall game is very polished. The story is also ok, and there are some cool parts like in the darker sections, or when a pterodactyl just stares at you and follow you with its head. However, there is a lack of enemy variety, there are no bosses, and the gameplay is simple and a bit repetitive in my opinion. The stealth mechanic is very basic, and you can't throw objects to distract the enemies (you can only hack speakers at specific locations to distract them). In my opinion this game could have easily been in the top 3 Quest games if it had combat (I think something like a Dino Crisis in VR would have been awesome), but unfortunately most of the game is basically just hiding from the raptors and accessing computer terminals. The game is still good, and if you don't mind the repetitive stealth mechanics then you will probably like this game a lot as it's an interesting and polished story-driven game with a cool environment. However if you expects more from a gameplay perspective, then maybe wait for a sale as the gameplay is not as fun as other story-driven titles like RE4, Batman, Iron Man, or even smaller indie titles like Genotype.
It actually scared me a couple times, and it’s a really fun game.

This game is amazing! From the raptor chases to the dilphosaurs in the dark. I love how Color full and vibrant the game is and how it has like a comic book art style. The ending raptor chase is the best part and how she glows in the dark.but I do wish that you could go out side of the park and into the woods and fields. That would make some epic chase and hide scenes. Every time the screen went red or the intense music played or when I saw her I got chills down my spine. I think that taking an iconic movie franchise like Jurassic world and having people see through the eyes of people who are running and hiding from the dinosaurs just is such a great idea. Over all this game can make you scared, sad, mad, empathy and excited. I recommend to all the people who like thrills and dinosaurs.

This game needs a sequel !!!

It’s a lot like Batman Arkham shadow but a Jurassic world version! Not really any way to interact with the Dinosaurs and I hope they add a mode for that soon!

Edit: In the gallery blue is on top on the truck so there isn’t really any way to study or take a closer look at her. Also for blue, Regular old blue then glowing blue have movement but no sound effects. This game gets no updates anymore which means it can be taken down one day soon and it’s been 5 years! And I still want to play the game. You can’t interact with the objects in the game. Also, I think they should have a training mode for the raptors. And a way to interact with the triceratops. And they may have worked hard on the raptors, T. rex, etc, but the pteranodon almost doesn’t look like the one in the movie. Not even the actions, they are NOT violent at all. But the T. rex is more violent than any other dinosaur in the game. (Bc of the dead sound effects.) amber processing is prob one of the best parts of the game. Some extra stuff is you could add a dinosaur fight scene or, a dinosaur dying scene like it the first Jurassic World movie of the brachiosaurus. Also they talked about indominus but we never see it. Not a red eye of it 
even. So, this game doesn’t suck, but it’s okay. Wish there was more updates.☹️☹️☹️edit2: When I try to play the end again it takes me to somewhere where I’m not supposed to be. I tried to play the ending again and it took me to a very bright room where I have already been a while ago on a mission. Then, I retried and I FELL OUT OF THE MAP! Then I was in a room with a raptor, it killed me so I trued AGAIN and it did the same thing.

reviews.review_title: A game that stole my heart
reviews.review_description: This is the epitome of VR for me right here, I have been eyeballing this game for a real long time, and I finally pushed a little money towards affording it. I wasn’t aware, however, that I had not just paid for it, I invested towards this game, and it returned HEAVILY. Everything from the dramatic storyline, beginning to end, to the VA, which absolutely blew me away, to the modeling and details of everything I experienced, I genuinely got so stuck into this game my head might be swelling from how tight my head strap was because of how immersing the experience was. We all can rest assured that Universal is still out here dropping games that deserve game of the year every year, and this was certainly no exception. I am so in love with just how good it got, and I want more, more of this ecstasy because I want to feel as good as I did in another one of these games since this was my first experience totally in VR, done especially with Jurassic World. Universal please, I am begging, pleading, and will begin crawling and crying, for there to be another game made. It’s called the collection, PLEASE ADD ANOTHER GAME TO IT. Don’t leave me out on the next best thing Universal, I will pay as much as need be for another game, just, please Universal, I hope I speak for everyone when I say, let there be another game. Please Universal.
The horror on this was insane and the detail and EVERYTHING but it would be REALLY cool if you could like be on the WHOLE island!!!!

One thing I wish I knew before playing is that you HAVE to turn in physical space. The joystick just turns too slowly 😅

reviews.review_description: I think this game has the potential to be amazing the plane scene and then the trex amazing but, after a while it's just raptors don't get me wrong there cool but after only being chased by raptor and the accessional Rex with super hearing it's boring if there was some compys and hadrosaur and maybe some stick drift comparability (like disable turning) this would be amazing but besides that this game is amazing with good graphics that I loved and also amazing voice acting I also like that they got the voice of dr wu to be in this game all around a good game but it lacks verity

This game exceeded my expectations on every single level, the Gel Shading graphics are PHENOMENAL, the raptors were suspenseful and so was the other dinosaurs (I won’t spoil it) and the whole story was just extremely well written and fabulous, im a big dinosaur guy and this made me very happy, took me about 12 hours of gameplay to beat it, and the Gallery feature is beautiful, I appreciate everything about this game and I NEED a sequel, this is the best game in the oculus store, the best thing about this game is the suspense, the amount of times my heart has dropped while playing this is insane, I've played it 10 times and I could play it infinite times more, if you sit and genuinely look at the attention to detail, its phenomenal, the story that was written INCLUDES the ACTUAL voices of the actors from the original Jurassic World, including Dr. Wu, Dr. Ian Malcom, so on and so forth, I 101% love this game so much and I definitely think you should buy this game, its worth hundreds of dollars, and the first time playing is the best time I've ever had playing any game on any console.

The animation is incredible, the story flows very nicely, and it did a very good job making the game pretty eerie. Now the game. Itself isn’t that scary, but it does give a creepy feeling. I would recommend this game to everyone I know and hope that more games like this are soon to come.

reviews.review_title: Among the best standalone VR games
reviews.review_description: Anxiety inducing games. Good balance between story, puzzle and hide & seek mechanics.

reviews.review_title: If you like dinos and suspense. Get it!
reviews.review_description:
Jurassic World Aftermath doesn’t just deliver on suspense—it does it with a unique, roguelike-inspired art style that totally works. The cel-shaded graphics give it a bold, clean look that sets it apart from other VR titles. And honestly? It makes the game even scarier. The sharp visuals make every raptor movement pop, and the lighting creates this eerie vibe that keeps you constantly on edge.

It’s like Alien: Isolation got reimagined in this slick, stylized world, but the fear and tension are cranked all the way up. The design doesn’t distract—it pulls you in. It’s proof that hyper-realism isn’t the only way to make VR immersive. This game knows its strengths and absolutely leans into them.

If you’re into roguelike graphics paired with survival horror gameplay, Jurassic World Aftermath hits the sweet spot. It’s stylish, tense, and absolutely unforgettable."
